question_text:
146 LRU Cache

LRU Cache

Design a data structure that follows the constraints of a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: Use an OrderedDict in Python to maintain insertion order while providing O(1) average lookup. Moving a key to the end on every access ensures the least recently used element is at the beginning. If capacity is exceeded, pop the first item.
